behaviors.description: Storing a PASS review summary is blocked when any stored dimension finding for the same round has a FAIL verdict.
behaviors.justification: The failure boundary is between summary-write logic and persisted per-dimension findings for that round. A unit test of summary text validation alone can miss mismatched DB state or query scoping bugs.
behaviors.test_description: Seed storage with one review round containing at least one dimension verdict=FAIL. Attempt to persist a PASS summary for that same round without override. Assert write is rejected, rejection reason references failing findings, and no PASS summary record is committed.

behaviors.description: Stop-gate verdict computation reads per-dimension stored findings directly and does not rely only on hand-written summary text.
behaviors.justification: This is a data-source-of-truth boundary across modules (gate evaluator + findings store + summary store). The real bug appears when conflicting persisted data exists.
behaviors.test_description: Create conflicting persisted state: summary text says all PASS, but one stored dimension finding is FAIL. Run stop-gate computation through the real service wiring. Assert gate verdict is non-PASS and decision rationale references stored findings, not summary prose.

behaviors.description: Manual summary text overrides require an explicit override flag and produce an auditable warning record.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on API/command input handling plus persistence of an audit artifact. A unit test could miss missing audit writes or transaction ordering issues.
behaviors.test_description: Case A: submit manual summary override text without override flag; assert rejection and no summary/audit write. Case B: submit with override flag; assert acceptance only under allowed policy and creation of an audit warning record containing actor, timestamp, round id, and reason.

behaviors.description: After Phase 4 fixes, the review loop cannot finalize PASS unless a fresh review-agent round is executed on the updated diff.
behaviors.justification: The failure is stale-state coordination (phase progression, diff versioning, and review-round metadata). It does not require real LLM quality/non-determinism; it requires real pipeline state wiring.
behaviors.test_description: Simulate a prior review round on diff A with FAIL findings, apply Phase 4 fixes producing diff B, then attempt finalize PASS without recording a new review-agent round for diff B. Assert finalization is blocked. Then record a fresh round tied to diff B and verify finalization can proceed only if findings permit.

behaviors.description: If review rounds are exhausted with unresolved MUST-FIX findings, the flow emits an escalation outcome instead of PASS.
behaviors.justification: This is policy evaluation over persisted findings plus round counters/state transitions. Real failures come from module interaction (counter logic + findings query + outcome emitter).
behaviors.test_description: Configure max rounds N, persist unresolved MUST-FIX findings through round N, and execute end-of-round decision. Assert outcome is ESCALATE (or equivalent), PASS is impossible, and escalation payload includes unresolved MUST-FIX references.
